content.text:
Q: How can I contribute translation for my language?
A: See #IPFS Translation Project: https://github.com/ipfs/i18n and contribute via https://www.transifex.com/ipfs/public/
content.html:
Q: How can I contribute translation for my language?
A: See #IPFS Translation Project: https://github.com/ipfs/i18n and contribute via https://www.transifex.com/ipfs/public/
